titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by University Archives staff, 1990 April; finding aid revised by Katharine A. Lawrie, 2013 July; machine-readable finding aid created by Katharine A. Lawrie, 2013 July.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using the Archivists' Toolkit 2013-07-17T09:56-0700

did.abstract: Record Series 191 contains publications of UCLA's School of Dentistry.

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: University of California, Los Angeles. School of Dentistry.

accessrestrict.head: Access
accessrestrict.p: COLLECTION STORED OFF-SITE AT SRLF: Open for research. Advance notice required for access. Contact the UCLA Library Special Collections Reference Desk for paging information.

userestrict.head: Publication Rights
userestrict.p: Copyright of portions of this collection has been assigned to The Regents of the University of California. The UCLA University Archives can grant permission to publish for materials to which it holds the copyright. All requests for permission to publish or quote must be submitted in writing to the UCLA University Archivist.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], School of Dentistry. Publications (University Archives Record Series 191). UCLA Library Special Collections, University Archives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Content
scopecontent.p: Record Series 191 contains publications of UCLA's School of Dentistry. Files include announcements, journals, magazines, yearbooks, and history of the school.
This is an inactive record series; no additional University records are expected to be added.

did.unittitle: UCLA School of Dentistry: The Planning Years.
